overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in period clothing walking along a rural dirt path through farmland toward a large plantation estate. A horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left as storm clouds gather overhead, and the character proceeds through the estate gates toward a grand brick mansion.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural farmland path alongside corn fields

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path through farmland with corn fields to the left and a wooden fence to the right under stormy skies

entered.detail: tall green corn stalks growing in organized rows alongside the path
weathered wooden split-rail fence running parallel to the path
large mature tree with dense green canopy
wooden telegraph pole with wires stretching across the field

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rural dirt path bordered by a corn field on the left and a wooden fence on the right. The sky is heavy with dark storm clouds, creating a moody, desaturated atmosphere across the open farmland.

events.description: horse-drawn carriage becomes visible ahead on the path, approaching from the distance
carriage passes by on the left side of the path, moving in the same direction

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path as a horse-drawn carriage approaches from ahead and passes by on the left

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn wooden carriage with driver moving along the path, passing the character on the left

entered.detail: wooden covered wagon pulled by a horse, moving along the dirt road
tall red brick pillars marking the entrance to the estate, with a white sign visible
large two-story brick plantation house with white columns and multiple chimneys

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, a horse-drawn carriage appears in the distance and passes by on the left. The path leads toward an estate entrance with brick gate pillars, and a large plantation house becomes visible in the background while the corn field continues alongside.

scene_state.functional_zone: plantation estate grounds and mansion approach

events.description: passing through the brick gate pillars into the formal estate grounds
path curves slightly as approaching the mansion entrance steps

agents.ego_description: walking through the estate gate and approaching the large plantation house along the gravel drive

entered.detail: smaller brick outbuilding with dark roof visible to the left of the main house
neatly trimmed bushes lining the driveway approach
grand entrance with tall white columns supporting the second-floor balcony

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the brick gate pillars into the estate grounds, leaving the farmland behind. The path becomes a gravel drive lined with manicured shrubs leading directly to the grand columned porch of the brick mansion, which dominates the view as the character approaches the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a moody, rural farmland path toward the imposing entrance of a grand plantation estate. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path bordered by a corn field and a wooden fence under a heavy, desaturated sky filled with storm clouds. As the character proceeds, a horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left while the path leads toward distant brick gate pillars and the first glimpse of a large house. The scene then shifts as the character passes through the gates, leaving the farmland behind for a manicured gravel drive lined with shrubs. This path leads directly toward the grand columned porch of the brick mansion, which dominates the view as the camera approaches the entrance.
